description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a combination of gable and flat roof sections. The structure features large windows on both floors, providing ample natural light, and a prominent garage with a dark roof. The rear side includes utility installations, such as washing machines, and a small covered entryway. The house sits on a rectangular paved lot, suggesting a modern residential neighborhood setting. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, and the main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no elaborate porch or columns.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large windows, a garage, and a mix of gable and flat roofs, set on a paved lot.
description_view_0: Rear view showing utility installations, a small covered entryway, and several windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable-roofed garage, large windows, and the two-story structure.
description_view_2: Opposite rear view with a flat brick wall, upper floor windows, and minimal exterior features.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry door, garage, and a mix of window sizes.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or columns, flush with the facade, adjacent to the garage
